name: Fort Collins Farmers' Market

Months Open.value: May, June, July, August, September, October, November

Products.value: Colorado-grown seasonal produce (vegetables, herbs, tomatoes, cucumbers, carrots, garlic, onions, spinach), plus bread, desserts, dairy, eggs, flowers, fruit (Palisade peaches, apples, pears), honey, jam, pickles, locally raised beef and pork, Alaskan seafood, coffee, popcorn, tamales, tortillas, salsas, soap, and specialty/handmade crafts

Address.value: 1001 E Harmony Rd., Fort Collins, CO 80525

notes: On-file website (fortnet.org/market) is dead - domain now redirects to an 'afternic.com' domain-for-sale parking page. On-file Facebook (facebook.com/pages/Fort-Collins-Farmers-Market-sponsored-by-CAMC/434286586584679) appears outdated; found the current official site at fortcollinsfarmersmarket.org (run by the Colorado Agricultural Marketing Cooperative, CAMC, since 1984) with its own current Facebook (facebook.com/fortcollinsfarmersmarket) and Instagram. Note there is also a separate, unrelated 'Fort Collins Winter Farmers Market' (winterfarmersmarket.com) - not used, as it is a different market entity. ADA accessibility and certified organic status were not stated on the official site, so omitted. Phone number not found.
